name: medmkp-net32-harvester
description: Read-only Net32 ingestion sidecar: a long-lived headful (xvfb) Chromium on the NUC that clears Cloudflare and drives Net32's /rest/neo JSON API (getBestPrice). The Medusa backend's net32 marketplace fetcher calls it over localhost, so Playwright never ships in the Render backend.
